001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml;
018
019import static javax.xml.stream.XMLStreamConstants.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
023import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
024import static org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml.XmlFormat.*;
025
026import java.io.*;
027import java.lang.reflect.*;
028import java.util.*;
029
030import javax.xml.stream.*;
031import javax.xml.stream.util.*;
032
033import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
035import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
036import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
037import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
038import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
039import org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap.*;
040
041/**
042 * Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link XmlParser}.
043 *
044 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
045 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
046 * </ul>
047 *
048 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
049 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/XmlBasics">XML Basics</a>
050
051 * </ul>
052 */
053@SuppressWarnings({
054   "java:S110",  // Deep inheritance inherent to the serializer/parser session hierarchy
055   "java:S115",  // PROP_xxx constants use camelCase after prefix intentionally (property keys, not enum-style constants)
056   "unchecked", // Type erasure requires unchecked casts
057   "rawtypes", // Raw types necessary for generic type handling
058   "resource" // RecordReader returned by RecordAdapter is a Closeable owned by the caller; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
059})
060public class XmlParserSession extends ReaderParserSession implements RecordReadable, ArrayRecordReadable {
061
062   // Property name constants
063   private static final String PROP_preserveRootElement = "preserveRootElement";
064   private static final String PROP_validating = "validating";
065   private static final String PROP_XmlParserSession_preserveRootElement = "XmlParserSession.preserveRootElement";
066   private static final String PROP_XmlParserSession_validating = "XmlParserSession.validating";
067
068   /**
069    * Builder class.
070    */
071   @SuppressWarnings({
072      "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
073   })
074   public abstract static class Builder<SELF extends Builder<SELF>> extends ReaderParserSession.Builder<SELF> {
075
076      private boolean preserveRootElement;
077      private boolean validating;
078      private XmlParser ctx;
079
080      /**
081       * Constructor
082       *
083       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
084       */
085      protected Builder(XmlParser ctx) {
086         super(ctx);
087         this.ctx = ctx;
088         preserveRootElement = ctx.isPreserveRootElement();
089         validating = ctx.isValidating();
090      }
091
092      @Override
093      public XmlParserSession build() {
094         return new XmlParserSession(this);
095      }
096
097      /**
098       * Preserve root element during XML parsing.
099       *
100       * @param value The new value for this setting.
101       * @return This object.
102       */
103      public SELF preserveRootElement(boolean value) {
104         preserveRootElement = value;
105         return self();
106      }
107
108      /**
109       * Validate XML during parsing.
110       *
111       * @param value The new value for this setting.
112       * @return This object.
113       */
114      public SELF validating(boolean value) {
115         validating = value;
116         return self();
117      }
118
119      @Override /* Overridden from Builder */
120      public SELF property(String key, Object value) {
121         if (key == null) { super.property(key, value); return self(); }
122         switch (key) {
123            case PROP_preserveRootElement, PROP_XmlParserSession_preserveRootElement:
124               return preserveRootElement(cvt(value, Boolean.class));
125            case PROP_validating, PROP_XmlParserSession_validating:
126               return validating(cvt(value, Boolean.class));
127            default:
128               super.property(key, value);
129               return self();
130         }
131      }
132
133   }
134
135   /**
136    * Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed {@code create()} path (CRTP terminal).
137    */
138   public static final class DefaultBuilder extends Builder<DefaultBuilder> {
139
140      DefaultBuilder(XmlParser ctx) {
141         super(ctx);
142      }
143   }
144
145   private static final int UNKNOWN = 0;
146   private static final int OBJECT = 1;
147   private static final int ARRAY = 2;
148   private static final int STRING = 3;
149   private static final int NUMBER = 4;
150   private static final int BOOLEAN = 5;
151   private static final int NULL = 6;
152
153   /**
154    * Creates a new builder for this object.
155    *
156    * @param ctx The context creating this session.
157    * @return A new builder.
158    */
159   @SuppressWarnings({
160      "java:S1452" // Builder<?> wildcard return intentional; callers use it to construct session instances polymorphically
161   })
162   public static Builder<?> create(XmlParser ctx) {
163      return new DefaultBuilder(ctx);
164   }
165
166   private static int getJsonType(String s) {
167      if (s == null)
168         return UNKNOWN;
169      var c = s.charAt(0);
170      return switch (c) {
171         case 'o' -> (s.equals("object") ? OBJECT : UNKNOWN);
172         case 'a' -> (s.equals("array") ? ARRAY : UNKNOWN);
173         case 's' -> (s.equals("string") ? STRING : UNKNOWN);
174         case 'b' -> (s.equals("boolean") ? BOOLEAN : UNKNOWN);
175         case 'n' -> {
176            c = s.charAt(2);
177            yield switch (c) {
178               case 'm' -> (s.equals("number") ? NUMBER : UNKNOWN);
179               case 'l' -> (s.equals("null") ? NULL : UNKNOWN);
180               default -> NUMBER;
181            };
182         }
183         default -> UNKNOWN;
184      };
185   }
186
187   private final XmlParser ctx;
188   private final boolean preserveRootElement;
189   private final boolean validating;
190
191   private final StringBuilder rsb = new StringBuilder();  // Reusable string builder used in this class.
192
193   /**
194    * Constructor.
195    *
196    * @param builder The builder for this object.
197    */
198   protected XmlParserSession(Builder<?> builder) {
199      super(builder);
200      ctx = builder.ctx;
201      preserveRootElement = builder.preserveRootElement;
202      validating = builder.validating;
203   }
204
205   /*
206    * Returns the name of the specified attribute on the current XML element.
207    * Any <js>'_x####_'</js> sequences in the string will be decoded.
208    */
209   private String getAttributeName(XmlReader r, int i) {
210      return decodeString(r.getAttributeLocalName(i));
211   }
212
213   /*
214    * Returns the value of the specified attribute on the current XML element.
215    * Any <js>'_x####_'</js> sequences in the string will be decoded.
216    */
217   private String getAttributeValue(XmlReader r, int i) {
218      return decodeString(r.getAttributeValue(i));
219   }
220
221   /*
222    * Takes the element being read from the XML stream reader and reconstructs it as XML.
223    * Used when reconstructing bean properties of type {@link XmlFormat#XMLTEXT}.
224    */
225   private String getElementAsString(XmlReader r) {
226      int t = r.getEventType();
227      if (t > 2)
228         throw rex("Invalid event type on stream reader for elementToString() method: ''{0}''", XmlUtils.toReadableEvent(r));
229      rsb.setLength(0);
230      rsb.append("<").append(t == 1 ? "" : "/").append(r.getLocalName());
231      if (t == 1)
232         for (var i = 0; i < r.getAttributeCount(); i++)
233            rsb.append(' ').append(r.getAttributeName(i)).append('=').append('\'').append(r.getAttributeValue(i)).append('\'');
234      rsb.append('>');
235      return rsb.toString();
236   }
237
238   /*
239    * Returns the name of the current XML element.
240    * Any <js>'_x####_'</js> sequences in the string will be decoded.
241    */
242   private String getElementName(XmlReader r) {
243      return decodeString(r.getLocalName());
244   }
245
246   /*
247    * Returns the _name attribute value.
248    * Any <js>'_x####_'</js> sequences in the string will be decoded.
249    */
250   private String getNameProperty(XmlReader r) {
251      return decodeString(r.getAttributeValue(null, MarshallingSession.NAME_PROPERTY_NAME));
252   }
253
254   /*
255    * Shortcut for calling <code>getText(r, <jk>true</jk>);</code>.
256    */
257   private String getText(XmlReader r) {
258      return getText(r, true);
259   }
260
261   /*
262    * Returns the content of the current CHARACTERS node.
263    * Any <js>'_x####_'</js> sequences in the string will be decoded.
264    * Leading and trailing whitespace (unencoded) will be trimmed from the result.
265    */
266   private String getText(XmlReader r, boolean trim) {
267      var s = r.getText();
268      if (trim)
269         s = s.trim();
270      if (s.isEmpty())
271         return null;
272      return decodeString(s);
273   }
274
275   @SuppressWarnings({
276      "null",        // Null handling verified by context or framework
277      "java:S3776",  // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this specific logic
278      "java:S6541",  // Brain Method — complex XML parsing logic; structural refactoring would reduce readability without meaningful benefit.
279   })
280   private Object getUnknown(XmlReader r) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException, XMLStreamException {
281      if (r.getEventType() != START_ELEMENT) {
282         throw new ParseException(this, "Parser must be on START_ELEMENT to read next text.");
283      }
284      MarshalledMap m = null;
285
286      // If this element has attributes, then it's always a MarshalledMap.
287      if (r.getAttributeCount() > 0) {
288         m = newGenericMap();
289         for (var i = 0; i < r.getAttributeCount(); i++) {
290            var key = getAttributeName(r, i);
291            var val = r.getAttributeValue(i);
292            if (! isSpecialAttr(key))
293               m.put(key, val);
294         }
295      }
296      int eventType = r.next();
297      var sb = getStringBuilder();
298      while (eventType != END_ELEMENT) {
299         if (eventType == CHARACTERS || eventType == CDATA || eventType == XMLStreamConstants.SPACE || eventType == ENTITY_REFERENCE) {
300            sb.append(r.getText());
301         } else if (eventType == PROCESSING_INSTRUCTION || eventType == COMMENT) {
302            // skipping
303         } else if (eventType == END_DOCUMENT) {
304            throw new ParseException(this, "Unexpected end of document when reading element text content");
305         } else if (eventType == START_ELEMENT) {
306            // Oops...this has an element in it.
307            // Parse it as a map.
308            if (m == null)
309               m = newGenericMap();
310            int depth = 0;
311            do {
312               int event = (eventType == -1 ? r.nextTag() : eventType);
313               String currAttr;
314               if (event == START_ELEMENT) {
315                  depth++;
316                  currAttr = getNameProperty(r);
317                  if (currAttr == null)
318                     currAttr = getElementName(r);
319                  String key = convertAttrToType(null, currAttr, string());
320                  var value = parseAnything(object(), currAttr, r, null, false, null);
321                  if (m.containsKey(key)) {
322                     var o = m.get(key);
323                     if (o instanceof MarshalledList o2)
324                        o2.add(value);
325                     else
326                        m.put(key, new JsonList(o, value).setBeanSession(this));
327                  } else {
328                     m.put(key, value);
329                  }
330
331               } else if (event == END_ELEMENT) {
332                  break;
333               }
334               eventType = -1;
335            } while (depth > 0);
336            break;
337         } else {
338            throw new ParseException(this, "Unexpected event type ''{0}''", eventType);
339         }
340         eventType = r.next();
341      }
342      var s = sb.toString().trim();
343      returnStringBuilder(sb);
344      s = decodeString(s);
345      if (nn(m)) {
346         if (! s.isEmpty())
347            m.put("contents", s);
348         return m;
349      }
350      return s;
351   }
352
353   private boolean isSpecialAttr(String key) {
354      return key.equals(getBeanTypePropertyName(null)) || key.equals(MarshallingSession.NAME_PROPERTY_NAME);
355   }
356
357   @SuppressWarnings({
358      "null", // Null handling verified by context or framework
359      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this specific logic
360      "java:S6541", // Single-threaded session contexts do not require synchronization
361   })
362   private <T> BeanMap<T> parseIntoBean(XmlReader r, BeanMap<T> m, boolean isNil) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException, XMLStreamException {
363      var bMeta = m.getMeta();
364      var xmlMeta = getXmlBeanMeta(bMeta);
365
366      for (var i = 0; i < r.getAttributeCount(); i++) {
367         String key = getAttributeName(r, i);
368         if (! ("nil".equals(key) || isSpecialAttr(key))) {
369            var val = r.getAttributeValue(i);
370            var ns = r.getAttributeNamespace(i);
371            var bpm = xmlMeta.getPropertyMeta(key);
372            if (bpm == null) {
373               if (nn(xmlMeta.getAttrsProperty())) {
374                  xmlMeta.getAttrsProperty().add(m, key, key, val);
375               } else if (ns == null) {
376                  onUnknownProperty(key, m, val);
377               }
378            } else {
379               try {
380                  bpm.set(m, key, val);
381               } catch (BeanRuntimeException e) {
382                  onBeanSetterException(bpm, e);
383                  throw e;
384               }
385            }
386         }
387      }
388
389      var cp = xmlMeta.getContentProperty();
390      var cpf = xmlMeta.getContentFormat();
391      var trim = cp == null || ! cpf.isOneOf(MIXED_PWS, TEXT_PWS);
392      ClassMeta<?> cpcm = (cp == null ? object() : (ClassMeta<?>) cp.getBeanInfo());
393      StringBuilder sb = null;
394      var breg = cp == null ? null : cp.getBeanRegistry();
395      List<Object> l = null;
396
397      int depth = 0;
398      do {
399         var event = r.next();
400         String currAttr;
401         // We only care about text in MIXED mode.
402         // Ignore if in ELEMENTS mode.
403         if (event == CHARACTERS) {
404            if (nn(cp) && cpf.isOneOf(MIXED, MIXED_PWS)) {
405               if (cpcm.isCollectionOrArray()) {
406                  if (l == null)
407                     l = new LinkedList<>();
408                  l.add(getText(r, false));
409               } else {
410                  cp.set(m, null, getText(r, trim));
411               }
412            } else if (cpf != ELEMENTS) {
413               var s = getText(r, trim);
414               if (nn(s)) {
415                  if (sb == null)
416                     sb = getStringBuilder();
417                  sb.append(s);
418               }
419            } else {
420               // Do nothing...we're in ELEMENTS mode.
421            }
422         } else if (event == START_ELEMENT) {
423            if (nn(cp) && cpf.isOneOf(TEXT, TEXT_PWS)) {
424               var s = parseText(r);
425               if (nn(s)) {
426                  if (sb == null)
427                     sb = getStringBuilder();
428                  sb.append(s);
429               }
430               depth--;
431            } else if (cpf == XMLTEXT) {
432               if (sb == null)
433                  sb = getStringBuilder();
434               sb.append(getElementAsString(r));
435               depth++;
436            } else if (nn(cp) && cpf.isOneOf(MIXED, MIXED_PWS)) {
437               if (isWhitespaceElement(r) && (breg == null || ! breg.hasName(r.getLocalName()))) {
438                  if (cpcm.isCollectionOrArray()) {
439                     if (l == null)
440                        l = new LinkedList<>();
441                     l.add(parseWhitespaceElement(r));
442                  } else {
443                     cp.set(m, null, parseWhitespaceElement(r));
444                  }
445               } else {
446                  if (cpcm.isCollectionOrArray()) {
447                     if (l == null)
448                        l = new LinkedList<>();
449                     l.add(parseAnything(cpcm.getElementType(), cp.getName(), r, m.getBean(false), false, cp));
450                  } else {
451                     cp.set(m, null, parseAnything(cpcm, cp.getName(), r, m.getBean(false), false, cp));
452                  }
453               }
454            } else if (nn(cp) && cpf == ELEMENTS) {
455               cp.add(m, null, parseAnything(cpcm.getElementType(), cp.getName(), r, m.getBean(false), false, cp));
456            } else {
457               currAttr = getNameProperty(r);
458               if (currAttr == null)
459                  currAttr = getElementName(r);
460               var pMeta = xmlMeta.getPropertyMeta(currAttr);
461               if (pMeta == null) {
462                  var value = parseAnything(object(), currAttr, r, m.getBean(false), false, null);
463                  onUnknownProperty(currAttr, m, value);
464               } else {
465                  setCurrentProperty(pMeta);
466                  var xf = getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(pMeta).getXmlFormat();
467                  if (xf == COLLAPSED) {
468                     var et = ((ClassMeta<?>) pMeta.getBeanInfo()).getElementType();
469                     var value = parseAnything(et, currAttr, r, m.getBean(false), false, pMeta);
470                     setName(et, value, currAttr);
471                     pMeta.add(m, currAttr, value);
472                  } else if (xf == ATTR) {
473                     pMeta.set(m, currAttr, getAttributeValue(r, 0));
474                     r.nextTag();
475                  } else {
476                     var cm = (ClassMeta<?>) pMeta.getBeanInfo();
477                     var value = parseAnything(cm, currAttr, r, m.getBean(false), false, pMeta);
478                     setName(cm, value, currAttr);
479                     pMeta.set(m, currAttr, value);
480                  }
481                  setCurrentProperty(null);
482               }
483            }
484         } else if (event == END_ELEMENT) {
485            if (depth > 0) {
486               if (cpf == XMLTEXT) {
487                  if (sb == null)
488                     sb = getStringBuilder();
489                  sb.append(getElementAsString(r));
490               } else
491                  throw new ParseException("End element found where one was not expected.  {0}", XmlUtils.toReadableEvent(r));
492            }
493            depth--;
494         } else if (event == COMMENT) {
495            // Ignore comments.
496         } else {
497            throw new ParseException("Unexpected event type: {0}", XmlUtils.toReadableEvent(r));
498         }
499      } while (depth >= 0);
500
501      if (nn(cp) && ! isNil) {
502         if (nn(sb))
503            cp.set(m, null, sb.toString());
504         else if (nn(l))
505            cp.set(m, null, XmlUtils.collapseTextNodes(l));
506         else if (cpcm.isCollectionOrArray()) {
507            var o = cp.get(m, null);
508            if (o == null)
509               cp.set(m, cp.getName(), list());
510         }
511      }
512
513      returnStringBuilder(sb);
514      return m;
515   }
516
517   private <E> Collection<E> parseIntoCollection(XmlReader r, Collection<E> l, ClassMeta<?> type, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException, XMLStreamException {
518      int depth = 0;
519      int argIndex = 0;
520      do {
521         var event = r.nextTag();
522         if (event == START_ELEMENT) {
523            depth++;
524            ClassMeta<?> elementType;
525            if (type == null) {
526               elementType = object();
527            } else if (type.isArgs()) {
528               elementType = type.getArg(argIndex++);
529            } else {
530               elementType = type.getElementType();
531            }
532            E value = (E)parseAnything(elementType, null, r, l, false, pMeta);
533            l.add(value);
534         } else if (event == END_ELEMENT) {
535            return l;
536         }
537      } while (depth > 0);
538      return l;
539   }
540
541   @SuppressWarnings({
542      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for parser state machine
543   })
544   private <K,V> Map<K,V> parseIntoMap(XmlReader r, Map<K,V> m, ClassMeta<K> keyType, ClassMeta<V> valueType, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta)
545      throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException, XMLStreamException {
546      int depth = 0;
547      for (var i = 0; i < r.getAttributeCount(); i++) {
548         var a = r.getAttributeLocalName(i);
549         if (! isSpecialAttr(a)) {
550            K key = trim(convertAttrToType(m, a, keyType));
551            V value = trim(convertAttrToType(m, r.getAttributeValue(i), valueType));
552            setName(valueType, value, key);
553            m.put(key, value);
554         }
555      }
556      do {
557         var event = r.nextTag();
558         String currAttr;
559         if (event == START_ELEMENT) {
560            depth++;
561            currAttr = getNameProperty(r);
562            if (currAttr == null)
563               currAttr = getElementName(r);
564            K key = convertAttrToType(m, currAttr, keyType);
565            V value = parseAnything(valueType, currAttr, r, m, false, pMeta);
566            setName(valueType, value, currAttr);
567            if (valueType.isObject() && m.containsKey(key)) {
568               var o = m.get(key);
569               if (o instanceof List o2)
570                  o2.add(value);
571               else
572                  m.put(key, (V)new JsonList(o, value).setBeanSession(this));
573            } else {
574               m.put(key, value);
575            }
576         } else if (event == END_ELEMENT) {
577            return m;
578         }
579      } while (depth > 0);
580      return m;
581   }
582
583   /**
584    * Decodes and trims the specified string.
585    *
586    * <p>
587    * Any <js>'_x####_'</js> sequences in the string will be decoded.
588    *
589    * @param s The string to be decoded.
590    * @return The decoded string.
591    */
592   protected final String decodeString(String s) {
593      if (s == null)
594         return null;
595      rsb.setLength(0);
596      s = XmlUtils.decode(s, rsb);
597      if (isTrimStrings())
598         s = s.trim();
599      return s;
600   }
601
602   @Override /* Overridden from ParserSession */
603   protected <T> T doParse(ParserPipe pipe, ClassMeta<T> type) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
604      try {
605         return parseAnything(type, null, getXmlReader(pipe), getOuter(), true, null);
606      } catch (XMLStreamException e) {
607         throw new ParseException(e);
608      }
609   }
610
611   @Override /* Overridden from ReaderParserSession */
612   protected <E> Collection<E> doParseIntoCollection(ParserPipe pipe, Collection<E> c, Type elementType) throws Exception {
613      var cm = getClassMeta(c.getClass(), elementType);
614      return parseIntoCollection(getXmlReader(pipe), c, cm.getElementType(), null);
615   }
616
617   @Override /* Overridden from ReaderParserSession */
618   protected <K,V> Map<K,V> doParseIntoMap(ParserPipe pipe, Map<K,V> m, Type keyType, Type valueType) throws Exception {
619      return parseIntoMap(getXmlReader(pipe), m, (ClassMeta<K>)getClassMeta(keyType), (ClassMeta<V>)getClassMeta(valueType), null);
620   }
621
622   /**
623    * Opens a whole-value pull-parser cursor over an XML document, bound to this live session.
624    *
625    * <p>
626    * Because XML's wire format (attributes, namespaces, mixed content) is non-trivial to expose
627    * as a fine-grained token cursor, this implementation supports only the cursor-level POJO
628    * bridge &mdash; {@link RecordReader#read(Class) read(...)} delegates to the polymorphic
629    * {@link ParserSession#parse(Object, Class)} entry point.
630    *
631    * @param input The input.
632    * @return A new {@link RecordReader} cursor.
633    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying input.
634    */
635   @Override /* RecordReadable */
636   public RecordReader parseRecords(Object input) throws IOException {
637      return RecordAdapter.reader(this, input);
638   }
639
640   /**
641    * Buffered array-element {@link RecordReader} for XML, bound to this live session.  Calls
642    * {@code parse(input, List.class, Object.class)} once and iterates the result.
643    *
644    * <p>
645    * For caller-specified-root semantics use {@link #parseArrayRecords(Object, String)}.
646    *
647    * @param input The input.
648    * @return A buffered {@link RecordReader}.
649    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred reading the input.
650    */
651   @Override /* ArrayRecordReadable */
652   public RecordReader parseArrayRecords(Object input) throws IOException {
653      return RecordAdapter.arrayReader(this, input);
654   }
655
656   /**
657    * Buffered array-element {@link RecordReader} that honors the caller-specified root element
658    * name.
659    *
660    * <p>
661    * The document is parsed once into a generic structure and the records to yield are selected by
662    * the supplied {@code rootElementName}:
663    * <ul>
664    *    <li>If the document root is a <b>wrapper element</b> (parses to a {@link Map}) that contains a
665    *       child named {@code rootElementName}, that child's value supplies the records (a repeated
666    *       child element parses to a {@link List}; a single occurrence yields one record).  Sibling
667    *       elements with other names are ignored.
668    *    <li>If the document root is an <b>array wrapper</b> (parses to a {@link List}, e.g. Juneau's
669    *       {@code <array>} envelope), its already-unwrapped elements are the records and the hint is a
670    *       no-op.
671    *    <li>A scalar root yields a single record.
672    * </ul>
673    *
674    * <p>
675    * A <jk>null</jk> {@code rootElementName} is equivalent to {@link #parseArrayRecords(Object)}.
676    * The cursor is buffered ({@link RecordReader#isStreaming()} == <jk>false</jk>); see
677    * {@code 175ab} Item 3 for why true element-at-a-time XML streaming is left for a
678    * demand-driven StAX cursor.
679    *
680    * @param input The input.
681    * @param rootElementName The name of the wrapping/child element whose occurrences are the
682    *    records.  <jk>null</jk> defers to {@link #parseArrayRecords(Object)}.
683    * @return A buffered {@link RecordReader}.
684    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred reading the input.
685    */
686   @Override /* ArrayRecordReadable */
687   public RecordReader parseArrayRecords(Object input, String rootElementName) throws IOException {
688      if (rootElementName == null)
689         return parseArrayRecords(input);
690      Object parsed;
691      try {
692         parsed = parse(input, Object.class);
693      } catch (ParseException e) {
694         throw new IOException(e);
695      }
696      var records = selectRootElements(parsed, rootElementName);
697      var iter = records.iterator();
698      return new RecordReader() {
699         @Override public boolean canRead() { return iter.hasNext(); }
700         @Override public <T> T read(Class<T> type) { return convertToType(nextElement(), type); }
701         @Override public <T> T read(ClassMeta<T> type) { return convertToType(nextElement(), type); }
702         @Override public <T> T read(Type type, Type... args) { return XmlParserSession.this.<T>convertToType(nextElement(), type, args); }
703         @Override public boolean isStreaming() { return false; }
704         @Override public void close() throws IOException {
705            if (input instanceof Closeable c)
706               c.close();
707         }
708         private Object nextElement() {
709            if (! iter.hasNext())
710               throw new IllegalStateException("Array stream is exhausted.");
711            return iter.next();
712         }
713      };
714   }
715
716   /** Selects the records to yield from a generically-parsed XML document, honoring the root-element hint. */
717   private static List<Object> selectRootElements(Object parsed, String rootElementName) {
718      if (parsed == null)
719         return Collections.emptyList();
720      if (parsed instanceof Map<?,?> m) {
721         var v = m.get(rootElementName);
722         if (v == null)
723            return Collections.emptyList();
724         if (v instanceof List<?> l)
725            return new ArrayList<>(l);
726         return new ArrayList<>(Collections.singletonList(v));
727      }
728      if (parsed instanceof List<?> l)
729         return new ArrayList<>(l);
730      return new ArrayList<>(Collections.singletonList(parsed));
731   }
732
733   /**
734    * The XML record cursor is buffered/{@link RecordAdapter}-backed, not O(1) streaming.
735    *
736    * @return Always <jk>false</jk>.
737    */
738   @Override /* RecordReadable */
739   public boolean isRecordStreaming() { return false; }
740
741   /**
742    * The XML array-record cursor is buffered/{@link RecordAdapter}-backed, not O(1) streaming.
743    *
744    * @return Always <jk>false</jk>.
745    */
746   @Override /* ArrayRecordReadable */
747   public boolean isArrayRecordStreaming() { return false; }
748
749   /**
750    * Returns the text content of the current XML element.
751    *
752    * <p>
753    * Any <js>'_x####_'</js> sequences in the string will be decoded.
754    *
755    * <p>
756    * Leading and trailing whitespace (unencoded) will be trimmed from the result.
757    *
758    * @param r The reader to read the element text from.
759    * @return The decoded text.  <jk>null</jk> if the text consists of the sequence <js>'_x0000_'</js>.
760    * @throws XMLStreamException Thrown by underlying reader.
761    * @throws IOException Thrown by underlying stream.
762    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
763    */
764   protected String getElementText(XmlReader r) throws XMLStreamException, IOException, ParseException {
765      return decodeString(r.getElementText().trim());
766   }
767
768   /**
769    * XML event allocator.
770    *
771    * @see XmlParser.Builder#eventAllocator(Class)
772    * @return
773    *    The {@link XMLEventAllocator} associated with this parser, or <jk>null</jk> if there isn't one.
774    */
775   protected final XMLEventAllocator getEventAllocator() { return ctx.getEventAllocator(); }
776
777   /**
778    * XML reporter.
779    *
780    * @see XmlParser.Builder#reporter(Class)
781    * @return
782    *    The {@link XMLReporter} associated with this parser, or <jk>null</jk> if there isn't one.
783    */
784   protected final XMLReporter getReporter() { return ctx.getReporter(); }
785
786   /**
787    * XML resolver.
788    *
789    * @see XmlParser.Builder#resolver(Class)
790    * @return
791    *    The {@link XMLResolver} associated with this parser, or <jk>null</jk> if there isn't one.
792    */
793   protected final XMLResolver getResolver() { return ctx.getResolver(); }
794
795   /**
796    * Returns the language-specific metadata on the specified bean.
797    *
798    * @param bm The bean to return the metadata on.
799    * @return The metadata.
800    */
801   protected XmlBeanMeta getXmlBeanMeta(BeanMeta<?> bm) {
802      return ctx.getXmlBeanMeta(bm);
803   }
804
805   /**
806    * Returns the language-specific metadata on the specified bean property.
807    *
808    * @param bpm The bean property to return the metadata on.
809    * @return The metadata.
810    */
811   protected XmlBeanPropertyMeta getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
812      return ctx.getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(bpm);
813   }
814
815   /**
816    * Returns the language-specific metadata on the specified class.
817    *
818    * @param cm The class to return the metadata on.
819    * @return The metadata.
820    */
821   protected XmlClassMeta getXmlClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
822      return ctx.getXmlClassMeta(cm);
823   }
824
825   /**
826    * Wrap the specified reader in a STAX reader based on settings in this context.
827    *
828    * @param pipe The parser input.
829    * @return The new STAX reader.
830    * @throws IOException Thrown by underlying stream.
831    * @throws XMLStreamException Unexpected XML processing error.
832    */
833   protected final XmlReader getXmlReader(ParserPipe pipe) throws IOException, XMLStreamException {
834      return new XmlReader(pipe, isValidating(), getReporter(), getResolver(), getEventAllocator());
835   }
836
837   /**
838    * Preserve root element during generalized parsing.
839    *
840    * @see XmlParser.Builder#preserveRootElement()
841    * @return
842    *    <jk>true</jk> if when parsing into a generic {@link JsonMap}, the map will contain a single entry whose key
843    *    is the root element name.
844    */
845   protected final boolean isPreserveRootElement() { return preserveRootElement; }
846
847   /**
848    * Enable validation.
849    *
850    * @see XmlParser.Builder#validating()
851    * @return
852    *    <jk>true</jk> if XML document will be validated.
853    */
854   protected final boolean isValidating() { return validating; }
855
856   /**
857    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if the current element is a whitespace element.
858    *
859    * <p>
860    * For the XML parser, this always returns <jk>false</jk>.
861    * However, the HTML parser defines various whitespace elements such as <js>"br"</js> and <js>"sp"</js>.
862    *
863    * @param r The XML stream reader to read the current event from.
864    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the current element is a whitespace element.
865    */
866   protected boolean isWhitespaceElement(XmlReader r) {
867      return false;
868   }
869
870   /**
871    * Workhorse method.
872    *
873    * @param <T> The expected type of object.
874    * @param eType The expected type of object.
875    * @param currAttr The current bean property name.
876    * @param r The reader.
877    * @param outer The outer object.
878    * @param isRoot If <jk>true</jk>, then we're serializing a root element in the document.
879    * @param pMeta The bean property metadata.
880    * @return The parsed object.
881    * @throws IOException Thrown by underlying stream.
882    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
883    * @throws ExecutableException Exception occurred on invoked constructor/method/field.
884    * @throws XMLStreamException Malformed XML encountered.
885    */
886   @SuppressWarnings({
887      "null",        // Null handling verified by context or framework
888      "java:S3776",  // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this specific logic
889      "java:S6541",  // Brain Method — complex XML parsing logic; structural refactoring would reduce readability without meaningful benefit.
890   })
891   protected <T> T parseAnything(ClassMeta<T> eType, String currAttr, XmlReader r, Object outer, boolean isRoot, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta)
892      throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException, XMLStreamException {
893
894      if (eType == null)
895         eType = (ClassMeta<T>)object();
896      var swap = (ObjectSwap<T,Object>)eType.getSwap(this);
897      var builder = (BuilderSwap<T,Object>)eType.getBuilderSwap(this);
898      ClassMeta<?> sType = null;
899      if (nn(builder))
900         sType = builder.getBuilderClassMeta(this);
901      else if (nn(swap))
902         sType = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
903      else
904         sType = eType;
905
906      if (sType.isOptional())
907         return (T)opt(parseAnything(eType.getElementType(), currAttr, r, outer, isRoot, pMeta));
908
909      setCurrentClass(sType);
910
911      var wrapperAttr = (isRoot && isPreserveRootElement()) ? r.getName().getLocalPart() : null;
912      var typeAttr = r.getAttributeValue(null, getBeanTypePropertyName(eType));
913      var isNil = "true".equals(r.getAttributeValue(null, "nil"));
914      var jsonType = getJsonType(typeAttr);
915      var elementName = getElementName(r);
916      if (jsonType == 0) {
917         if (elementName == null || elementName.equals(currAttr))
918            jsonType = UNKNOWN;
919         else {
920            typeAttr = elementName;
921            jsonType = getJsonType(elementName);
922         }
923      }
924
925      ClassMeta tcm = getClassMeta(typeAttr, pMeta, eType);
926      if (tcm == null && nn(elementName) && ! elementName.equals(currAttr))
927         tcm = getClassMeta(elementName, pMeta, eType);
928      if (nn(tcm))
929         sType = eType = tcm;
930
931      Object o = null;
932
933      if (jsonType == NULL) {
934         r.nextTag();   // Discard end tag
935         return null;
936      }
937
938      if (sType.isObject()) {
939         if (jsonType == OBJECT) {
940            var m = newGenericMap();
941            parseIntoMap(r, m, string(), object(), pMeta);
942            if (nn(wrapperAttr))
943               m = newGenericMap().append(wrapperAttr, m);
944            o = cast(m, pMeta, eType);
945         } else if (jsonType == ARRAY)
946            o = parseIntoCollection(r, newGenericList(), null, pMeta);
947         else if (jsonType == STRING) {
948            o = getElementText(r);
949            if (sType.isChar())
950               o = parseCharacter(o);
951         } else if (jsonType == NUMBER)
952            o = parseNumber(getElementText(r), null);
953         else if (jsonType == BOOLEAN)
954            o = Boolean.parseBoolean(getElementText(r));
955         else if (jsonType == UNKNOWN)
956            o = getUnknown(r);
957      } else if (nn(builder) || sType.canCreateNewBean(outer)) {
958         if (getXmlClassMeta(sType).getFormat() == COLLAPSED) {
959            var fieldName = r.getLocalName();
960            var m = nn(builder) ? toBeanMap(builder.create(this, eType)) : newBeanMap(outer, sType.inner());
961            var bpm = getXmlBeanMeta(m.getMeta()).getPropertyMeta(fieldName);
962            var cm = (ClassMeta<?>) m.getMeta().getBeanInfo();
963            Object value = parseAnything(cm, currAttr, r, m.getBean(false), false, null);
964            setName(cm, value, currAttr);
965            bpm.set(m, currAttr, value);
966            o = nn(builder) ? builder.build(this, m.getBean(), eType) : m.getBean();
967         } else {
968            var m = nn(builder) ? toBeanMap(builder.create(this, eType)) : newBeanMap(outer, sType.inner());
969            m = parseIntoBean(r, m, isNil);
970            o = nn(builder) ? builder.build(this, m.getBean(), eType) : m.getBean();
971         }
972      } else if (sType.isMap()) {
973         var m = (sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? (Map)sType.newInstance(outer) : newGenericMap(sType));
974         o = parseIntoMap(r, m, sType.getKeyType(), sType.getValueType(), pMeta);
975         if (nn(wrapperAttr)) {
976            var wrapper = (sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? (Map)sType.newInstance(outer) : newGenericMap());
977            wrapper.put(wrapperAttr, m);
978            o = wrapper;
979         }
980      } else if (sType.isCollection()) {
981         var l = (sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? (Collection)sType.newInstance(outer) : newGenericList());
982         o = parseIntoCollection(r, l, sType, pMeta);
983      } else if (sType.isArray() || sType.isArgs()) {
984         var l = (ArrayList)parseIntoCollection(r, list(), sType, pMeta);
985         o = toArray(sType, l);
986      } else if (sType.isCharSequence()) {
987         o = getElementText(r);
988      } else if (sType.isChar()) {
989         o = parseCharacter(getElementText(r));
990      } else if (sType.isNumber()) {
991         o = parseNumber(getElementText(r), (Class<? extends Number>)sType.inner());
992      } else if (sType.isBoolean()) {
993         o = Boolean.parseBoolean(getElementText(r));
994      } else if (sType.isDate()) {
995         o = parseDate(getElementText(r), sType);
996      } else if (sType.isCalendar()) {
997         o = parseCalendar(getElementText(r), sType);
998      } else if (sType.isTemporal()) {
999         o = parseTemporal(getElementText(r), sType);
1000      } else if (sType.isDuration()) {
1001         o = parseDuration(getElementText(r));
1002      } else if (sType.isPeriod()) {
1003         o = parsePeriod(getElementText(r));
1004      } else if (sType.canCreateNewInstanceFromString(outer)) {
1005         o = sType.newInstanceFromString(outer, getElementText(r));
1006      } else if (nn(sType.getProxyInvocationHandler())) {
1007         var m = newGenericMap();
1008         parseIntoMap(r, m, string(), object(), pMeta);
1009         if (nn(wrapperAttr))
1010            m = newGenericMap().append(wrapperAttr, m);
1011         o = newBeanMap(outer, sType.inner()).load(m).getBean();
1012      } else {
1013         throw new ParseException(this, "Class ''{0}'' could not be instantiated.  Reason: ''{1}'', property: ''{2}''", cn(sType), sType.getNotABeanReason(),
1014            pMeta == null ? null : pMeta.getName());
1015      }
1016
1017      if (nn(swap) && nn(o))
1018         o = unswap(swap, o, eType);
1019
1020      if (nn(outer))
1021         setParent(eType, o, outer);
1022
1023      return (T)o;
1024   }
1025
1026   /**
1027    * Parses the current element as text.
1028    *
1029    * @param r The input reader.
1030    * @return The parsed text.
1031    * @throws XMLStreamException Thrown by underlying reader.
1032    * @throws IOException Thrown by underlying stream.
1033    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
1034    */
1035   protected String parseText(XmlReader r) throws IOException, XMLStreamException, ParseException {
1036      // Note that this is different than {@link #getText(XmlReader)} since it assumes that we're pointing to a
1037      // whitespace element.
1038
1039      var sb2 = getStringBuilder();
1040
1041      int depth = 0;
1042      while (true) {
1043         var et = r.getEventType();
1044         if (et == START_ELEMENT) {
1045            sb2.append(getElementAsString(r));
1046            depth++;
1047         } else if (et == CHARACTERS) {
1048            sb2.append(getText(r));
1049         } else if (et == END_ELEMENT) {
1050            sb2.append(getElementAsString(r));
1051            depth--;
1052            if (depth <= 0)
1053               break;
1054         }
1055         r.next();
1056      }
1057      var s = sb2.toString();
1058      returnStringBuilder(sb2);
1059      return s;
1060   }
1061
1062   /**
1063    * Parses the current whitespace element.
1064    *
1065    * <p>
1066    * For the XML parser, this always returns <jk>null</jk> since there is no concept of a whitespace element.
1067    * However, the HTML parser defines various whitespace elements such as <js>"br"</js> and <js>"sp"</js>.
1068    *
1069    * @param r The XML stream reader to read the current event from.
1070    * @return The whitespace character or characters.
1071    * @throws XMLStreamException Thrown by underlying reader.
1072    * @throws IOException Thrown by underlying stream.
1073    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
1074    */
1075   protected String parseWhitespaceElement(XmlReader r) throws IOException, XMLStreamException, ParseException {
1076      return null;
1077   }
1078}
